title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Silchar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD/EWS candidates will get relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent, B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE, Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category, Minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent OR B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE. Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category. Minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. (or 7.5/10 CGPA for B.Tech only under GEN etc.)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Silchar is 15-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent, or a B.Tech/B.E in ECE with specific minimum aggregate marks or CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- Per Month along with HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted in online or offline mode.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Silchar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through email only.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam, with the pincode 788010.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITS/Dean(R&C)/ECE./689/02/2026.
